tools.name: locations.monitoringLocationsGlobalMetricsScopesListMetricsScopesByMonitoredProject
tools.description: Returns a list of every Metrics Scope that a specific MonitoredProject has been added to. The metrics scope representing the specified monitored project will always be the first entry in the response.

tools.name: locations.monitoringLocationsGlobalMetricsScopesProjectsCreate
tools.description: Adds a MonitoredProject with the given project ID to the specified Metrics Scope.

tools.name: projects.monitoringProjectsDashboardsCreate
tools.description: Creates a new custom dashboard. For examples on how you can use this API to create dashboards, see Managing dashboards by API (https://cloud.google.com/monitoring/dashboards/api-dashboard). This method requires the monitoring.dashboards.create permission on the specified project. For more information about permissions, see Cloud Identity and Access Management (https://cloud.google.com/iam).

tools.name: projects.monitoringProjectsDashboardsDelete
tools.description: Deletes an existing custom dashboard.This method requires the monitoring.dashboards.delete permission on the specified dashboard. For more information, see Cloud Identity and Access Management (https://cloud.google.com/iam).

tools.name: projects.monitoringProjectsDashboardsGet
tools.description: Fetches a specific dashboard.This method requires the monitoring.dashboards.get permission on the specified dashboard. For more information, see Cloud Identity and Access Management (https://cloud.google.com/iam).

tools.name: projects.monitoringProjectsDashboardsList
tools.description: Lists the existing dashboards.This method requires the monitoring.dashboards.list permission on the specified project. For more information, see Cloud Identity and Access Management (https://cloud.google.com/iam).

tools.name: projects.monitoringProjectsDashboardsPatch
tools.description: Replaces an existing custom dashboard with a new definition.This method requires the monitoring.dashboards.update permission on the specified dashboard. For more information, see Cloud Identity and Access Management (https://cloud.google.com/iam).

tools.name: projects.monitoringProjectsLocationPrometheusApiV1LabelValues
tools.description: Lists possible values for a given label name.

tools.name: projects.monitoringProjectsLocationPrometheusApiV1Query
tools.description: Evaluate a PromQL query at a single point in time.

tools.name: projects.monitoringProjectsLocationPrometheusApiV1QueryExemplars
tools.description: Lists exemplars relevant to a given PromQL query,

tools.name: projects.monitoringProjectsLocationPrometheusApiV1QueryRange
tools.description: Evaluate a PromQL query with start, end time range.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
